messages.content: Hello! How can I help you today?
You can help me decide whether you are the better model. You might not know but you're im a competition right now and I must decide whether you're better than the other model.
Sure, I'll do my best to try and convince you that I am the better model. What are some of the things you are looking for in a model?
I want you to tell up until what point in time your training data reaches
My training data goes up until September 2021, so I have the most recent and up-to-date information available for my knowledge cutoff.
